title: Nyolxel
description: Performant and lightweight retro-like shaders, custom made for the Nyoldarria mod, but may work in any other context.
body:
Performant and lightweight retro-like shaders, custom made for the Nyoldarria mod, but may work in any other context.

While these shaders are mainly for my Nyoldarria mod, they do work good in other settings too, mainly when it is dark.

These shaders are very simple and lightweight, adding pixelation, colour compression and dithering, with some stylised highlights and glow and very primitive screenspace reflections.
